name: @wmcadigital/components/images
description: Images component (SCSS + Nunjucks) from WMCA design system

scripts.build:njk: mkdir -p dist && cp src/_images.njk dist/images.njk && cp src/_image-with-summary.njk dist/image-with-summary.njk || true
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:njk

author: WMCA
